accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text or accurate verifiable context (BLM ROD issued April 25, 2022; GAO opinion July 24, 2025; CRA substantially-similar bar).

no_hallucinations.why: The CRA identification, BLM as administering agency, and the substantially-similar reissuance bar are all accurate context, not fabrications.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the bill uses the CRA to nullify the BLM's NPR-A Integrated Activity Plan Record of Decision.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary correctly explains the resolution voids the 2022 rule under the CRA and bars substantially similar reissuance.

exceptions_conditions.why: It notes the key CRA condition that BLM may not issue a substantially similar rule without future statutory authorization.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly states the resolution took effect upon approval on December 5, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: It captures the essential operative effect: disapproval of the rule so it has no force or effect, plus the reissuance bar.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized, consistent, and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is succinct with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: BLM, NPR-A, GAO, and the Congressional Review Act are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The dates stated (April 25, 2022; July 24, 2025; December 5, 2025) all match the record.
